title: How to enable search grounding on free tier?
author: patricktu1258
selftext:
I'm currently building a market analysis tool using the Gemini 3 Flash API. My goal is to have the AI summarize the latest market trends and news.

However, the provided information isn't new enough for stock market analysis. I tried to implement the grounding feature using 

    tools=[types.Tool(google_search=types.GoogleSearch())]
    

But I encounter a "Quota exceeded" error in my first prompt. It seems like gemini API doesn't support search grounding for free tier, despite what their website claims. Does anyone know how to solve this?
